Enabling REStake will authorize the validator to send Delegate transactions on your behalf for 1 year using Authz.
They will only be authorized to delegate to their own validator. You can revoke the authorization at any time and everything is open source.

The validators will pay the transaction fees for you.

Built with 💚  by ECO Stake 🌱Interchain APIs from cosmos.directory
